subcodes.first_line: The Book which the All-Bountiful hath revealed: verily, it bringeth tidings unto the world of the Manifestation of the Most Great Name. Blessed is he that hath attained thereunto, and woe betide the heedless ones [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله الکریم انه یبشر العالم بظهور الاسم الاعظم طوبی لمن فاز ویل للغافلین و انه
